if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND a.ui_id = #{uiId} AND a.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUiArea :: selectById */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , are.area_nm AS area_nm FROM dp_ui_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = a.area_id WHERE a.ui_area_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUiArea :: selectList */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , are.area_nm AS area_nm FROM dp_ui_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = a.area_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUiArea :: selectPageList */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , are.area_nm AS area_nm FROM dp_ui_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = a.area_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpUiArea :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_ui_area a
